requirement_topic.en: Mandatory Energy Efficiency Label (Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética) — Secretaría de Energía Star Rating 1–5
requirement_topic.zh: 强制能效标签（Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética）——能源秘书处1–5星评级
requirement_topic.zht: 強制能效標籤（Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética）——能源秘書處1–5星評級

summary.en: The Secretaría de Energía (SE) mandates an energy-efficiency label — the Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética — for air conditioners sold in Argentina under Res. SE 419/99 and its updates (including Res. E 47/2017). The label uses a 1-to-5 star scale, where 5 stars represents the highest efficiency. Products must meet minimum energy performance standards (MEPS) as a condition of sale. The label must display EER (cooling) and, where applicable, COP (heating) values, refrigerant type and charge, and the star band. The importer or local distributor is responsible for obtaining and affixing the approved label before offering the product for sale. Labels and MEPS thresholds are periodically revised by the Secretaría de Energía.
summary.zh: 能源秘书处（SE）依据Res. SE 419/99及其更新（包括Res. E 47/2017）强制要求在阿根廷销售的空调器贴附能效标签——Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética。标签采用1–5星制，5星代表最高效率。产品须满足最低能效要求（MEPS）方可销售。标签须注明EER（制冷）及适用时的COP（制热）值、制冷剂类型及充注量，以及星级。进口商或当地经销商负责在产品上市前获取并粘贴经批准的标签。标签及MEPS阈值由能源秘书处定期修订。
summary.zht: 能源秘書處（SE）依據Res. SE 419/99及其更新（包括Res. E 47/2017）強制要求在阿根廷銷售的空調器貼附能效標籤——Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética。標籤採用1–5星制，5星代表最高效率。產品須滿足最低能效要求（MEPS）方可銷售。標籤須標注EER（製冷）及適用時的COP（製熱）值、製冷劑類型及充注量，以及星級。進口商或當地經銷商負責在產品上市前獲取並貼附經批准的標籤。標籤及MEPS閾值由能源秘書處定期修訂。

standards_or_laws: Res. SE 419/99 (mandatory energy efficiency labelling for air conditioners, Argentina)
Res. E 47/2017 (updated energy efficiency label tiers and MEPS for air conditioners, Argentina)
IRAM 2253 (energy performance test method for room air conditioners, Argentina)

summary.en: China mandates the China Energy Label (CEL) for room air conditioners under the Energy Conservation Law and MIIT/NDRC regulations, using a 1–5 grade scale (Grade 1 = highest efficiency). COP and SEER/APF values are declared and published in the MIIT energy label registry. The CEL scheme and China GB/T 7725 test methodology are not recognised by the Secretaría de Energía for the Argentine label requirement.
summary.zh: 中国依据《节能法》及工信部/国家发改委法规强制要求房间空调器贴附中国能效标识（CEL），采用1–5级制（1级=最高效率），COP及SEER/APF值须申报并在工信部能效标识数据库公示。CEL制度及中国GB/T 7725检测方法不被阿根廷能源秘书处认可用于满足阿根廷标签要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據《節能法》及工信部/國家發改委法規強制要求房間空調器貼附中國能效標識（CEL），採用1–5級制（1級=最高效率），COP及SEER/APF值須申報並在工信部能效標識數據庫公示。CEL制度及中國GB/T 7725檢測方法不被阿根廷能源秘書處認可用於滿足阿根廷標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (CEL) — room air conditioners
GB 21455 (MEPS for room air conditioners, China)
GB/T 7725 (test method for room air conditioners, China)

gap.en: Chinese CEL labels and GB/T 7725 test results do not satisfy the Argentine Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética requirement. Exporters must supply EER and COP performance data derived from IRAM 2253 (or equivalent recognised method) testing so that the Argentine importer can apply for the star-band label from the Secretaría de Energía. Products that fail to meet current MEPS thresholds under Res. E 47/2017 cannot legally be sold in Argentina regardless of Chinese efficiency grades.
gap.zh: 中国CEL标签及GB/T 7725测试结果不能满足阿根廷Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética要求。出口商须提供依据IRAM 2253（或等效认可方法）测试所得的EER和COP性能数据，供阿根廷进口商向能源秘书处申请星级标签。不符合Res. E 47/2017现行MEPS阈值的产品，无论中国效率等级如何，均不得在阿根廷合法销售。
gap.zht: 中國CEL標籤及GB/T 7725測試結果不能滿足阿根廷Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética要求。出口商須提供依據IRAM 2253（或等效認可方法）測試所得的EER和COP性能數據，供阿根廷進口商向能源秘書處申請星級標籤。不符合Res. E 47/2017現行MEPS閾值的產品，無論中國效率等級如何，均不得在阿根廷合法銷售。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for air conditioners sold in Argentina under Res. SE 419/99 and Res. E 47/2017
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory CEL label under Chinese national scheme; not equivalent to Argentine Etiqueta de Eficiencia Energética

source.publisher: Secretaría de Energía, Ministerio de Economía, Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Major gap — a separate Argentine energy-efficiency label (1–5 stars) and MEPS compliance under Res. E 47/2017 are required; Chinese CEL documentation does not satisfy this requirement and IRAM 2253-based test data must be obtained.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在重大差距——须依据Res. E 47/2017取得单独的阿根廷能效标签（1–5星）并满足MEPS要求；中国CEL文件不能满足此要求，须获取基于IRAM 2253的测试数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在重大差距——須依據Res. E 47/2017取得單獨的阿根廷能效標籤（1–5星）並滿足MEPS要求；中國CEL文件不能滿足此要求，須獲取基於IRAM 2253的測試數據。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage and Frequency Compatibility — 220 V 50 Hz (Argentina vs China)
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压与频率兼容性——220 V 50 Hz（阿根廷与中国对比）
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓與頻率相容性——220 V 50 Hz（阿根廷與中國對比）

summary.en: Argentina operates a 220 V (single-phase) / 380 V (three-phase) 50 Hz electrical grid, administered under ENRE (Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad) distribution standards. This matches China's standard residential supply (220 V single-phase, 50 Hz), meaning Chinese-manufactured heat pumps and split air conditioners rated for 220 V 50 Hz require no voltage or frequency conversion for the Argentine grid. Earthing and plug/socket formats differ (IRAM 2073 CEE 7/5-compatible three-pin plug is standard in Argentina) and must be verified.
summary.zh: 阿根廷采用220 V（单相）/ 380 V（三相）50 Hz电网，由ENRE（国家电力监管机构）配电标准主管。这与中国标准住宅供电（220 V单相，50 Hz）一致，意味着额定220 V 50 Hz的中国产热泵和分体空调无需进行电压或频率转换即可在阿根廷电网使用。接地方式和插头/插座形式不同（阿根廷标准为IRAM 2073 CEE 7/5兼容三针插头），须予以核验。
summary.zht: 阿根廷採用220 V（單相）/ 380 V（三相）50 Hz電網，由ENRE（國家電力監管機構）配電標準主管。這與中國標準住宅供電（220 V單相，50 Hz）一致，意味著額定220 V 50 Hz的中國產熱泵和分體空調無需進行電壓或頻率轉換即可在阿根廷電網使用。接地方式和插頭/插座形式不同（阿根廷標準為IRAM 2073 CEE 7/5相容三針插頭），須予以核驗。

standards_or_laws: IRAM 2073 (plugs, socket-outlets and couplers for household and similar purposes, Argentina)
IEC 60083 (plugs and socket-outlets for domestic and similar general use, reference)

summary.en: China's residential grid is 220 V single-phase, 50 Hz — identical voltage and frequency to Argentina. Chinese heat pumps rated for 220 V 50 Hz are inherently grid-compatible with Argentina's supply. Chinese plugs (GB 2099.1 / GB 1002) differ from Argentina's IRAM 2073 plug format and must be changed for Argentine market supply.
summary.zh: 中国住宅电网为220 V单相、50 Hz，与阿根廷电压和频率完全相同。额定220 V 50 Hz的中国热泵与阿根廷供电天然兼容。中国插头（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）与阿根廷IRAM 2073插头形式不同，须在供应阿根廷市场时更换。
summary.zht: 中國住宅電網為220 V單相、50 Hz，與阿根廷電壓和頻率完全相同。額定220 V 50 Hz的中國熱泵與阿根廷供電天然相容。中國插頭（GB 2099.1 / GB 1002）與阿根廷IRAM 2073插頭形式不同，須在供應阿根廷市場時更換。

standards_or_laws: GB 2099.1 (plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes, China)

gap.en: No voltage or frequency gap — both markets are 220 V 50 Hz. Minor gap: plug format must be changed to IRAM 2073 (Argentine standard) for products with an attached supply cord. Earthing topology and wiring colour conventions should be verified against Argentine requirements during INTI type-approval testing.
gap.zh: 无电压或频率差距——两市场均为220 V 50 Hz。小差距：带电源线的产品须将插头更换为IRAM 2073（阿根廷标准）格式。接地拓扑和布线颜色规范须在INTI型式批准测试中对照阿根廷要求进行核验。
gap.zht: 無電壓或頻率差距——兩市場均為220 V 50 Hz。小差距：帶電源線的產品須將插頭更換為IRAM 2073（阿根廷標準）格式。接地拓撲和布線顏色規範須在INTI型式批准測試中對照阿根廷要求進行核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Plug format and earthing compliance mandatory under INTI/IRAM certification; grid voltage compatibility is inherent (no conversion required)
mandatory_status.cn: GB plug standard mandatory for Chinese domestic market; not compatible with Argentine IRAM 2073 plug format

source.publisher: ENRE (Ente Nacional Regulador de la Electricidad), Argentina

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No voltage or frequency gap (both 220 V 50 Hz) — a favourable factor for Chinese exporters. Plug format change (to IRAM 2073) and earthing verification during INTI type-approval remain required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 无电压或频率差距（均为220 V 50 Hz）——对中国出口商有利。仍须在INTI型式批准过程中完成插头格式更换（至IRAM 2073）及接地核验。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 無電壓或頻率差距（均為220 V 50 Hz）——對中國出口商有利。仍須在INTI型式批准過程中完成插頭格式更換（至IRAM 2073）及接地核驗。
